- Packs: `repo/packs/<pack_id>/<version>/pack.tlv` (single TLV per version). Version directories are 8-digit, zero-padded integers (e.g. `00000001`). The built-in base pack lives at `repo/packs/base/00000001/pack.tlv`.
- Mods: `repo/mods/<mod_id>/<version>/mod.tlv` with the same zero-padded version directory rule. Future optional override assets live alongside the TLV.
- `output_root` defaults to `repo/packs` at the repository root.

- **Launcher:** discovers products under `repo/products/`, instances under `instances/`, evaluates compatibility, and spawns the requested product (game/setup/tools) using `dsys_proc_spawn`. GUI/TUI shells stay inside DVIEW/DUI.
- Every product is a Domino-based binary located under `repo/products/<product>/<product_version>/core-<core_version>/<OSFam-Arch>/bin/`.
"exception_reason": "Root-level repo/ contains active release policy, RepoX rulesets/exemptions, and canon state material referenced by governance, release, and planning surfaces.",
"replacement_plan": "Classify repo-root support files into a declared repo/support domain in a later non-runtime cleanup pass.",
